provenance: Draft FLAME registration of the project RSTL atlas. Source atlas: assets/atlas_rstl.json (mediapipe-468/mediapipe-canonical-468-v1); classic RSTL reference bundle: RSTL/; registration: 3D polyharmonic spline from MediaPipe canonical landmarks to the FLAME 2023 Open MediaPipe embedding, then nearest FLAME-surface projection. validated=false; requires clinical line-by-line review.
